title: How Anthropic Doesn't Build the WRONG Things with Claude
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes four rules used by Anthropic founders Dario and Daniela Amodei to decide what products to build with Claude. The video claims these principles help avoid building the wrong things and apply to startups, side projects, and organizational use cases.
